subtitle: Nurture your mindset, one affirmation at a time

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's featured affirmation, practice streak ring, mood lift summary, and quick-add button. Highlights favorite affirmations and shows a motivational progress overview.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-entry modal for logging an affirmation practice session: write or select an affirmation, pick a category, rate mood before and after, log duration, optionally reflect.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological and filterable list of all past affirmation entries. Group by date, filter by category or favorites. Tap to revisit and re-read past affirmations.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Rich analytics: mood lift trend over time (before vs after delta), category distribution pie chart, practice consistency heatmap, weekly/monthly averages, and AI-style textual insights.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayPracticeMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total minutes spent practicing affirmations today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAverageMoodLift
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average (moodAfter - moodBefore) for today's sessions, representing the immediate emotional impact of practice

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one affirmation practice session

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive practice streak in days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPracticeMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total practice minutes in the current calendar week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyMoodLiftTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's average mood lift compared to last week's average, expressed as a percentage change

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries per AffirmationCategory for pie chart visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteAffirmations
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries marked as favorite, sorted by most recent, for quick revisit

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodLiftChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood lift (after minus before) over the last 30 days for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: practiceConsistencyRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of the last 30 days that had at least one practice session

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The most frequently used affirmation category in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily practice goal completed today (todayPracticeMinutes / dailyGoalMinutes)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: e.g., 'Your mood lifts most with Self-Worth affirmations', 'You practice most on Mondays', 'Your average mood lift improved 15% this week'

dailyGoal.description: Target number of minutes spent on affirmation practice per day

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if the user logged at least one affirmation practice entry (any duration, any category)
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly average mood lift (moodAfter - moodBefore) compared to the prior week. Also track practice consistency rate (days practiced / total days) on a rolling 30-day window. Flag if mood lift is declining despite consistent practice, suggesting the user refresh their affirmations.
insights: Most impactful category: which AffirmationCategory yields the highest average mood lift
Best practice time: hour of day when mood lift is greatest (derived from entry timestamps)
Consistency momentum: 'You've practiced X of the last 7 days — Y away from a full week'
Mood trend direction: 'Your average mood lift is trending up/down X% vs last week'
Favorite density: 'You've favorited X affirmations — revisiting favorites can reinforce positive neural pathways'
Category balance: 'You've focused heavily on Career this month — consider adding Self-Worth or Gratitude affirmations for balance'
Streak celebration: milestone messages at 7, 14, 30, 60, 100, 365 day streaks
Practice depth: 'Your average session is X minutes — longer sessions (5+ min) correlate with higher mood lifts in your data'
